posts.author: 37-Vansh_Saini-A
posts.text: Hey sir @RajeevJ @armchairinvest _ @ayushmit , hope you all are doing well. Long time and thread is quite unactive, I am new to the industry and looking at Gelatine players. Nitta and Narmada have posted very good margins this time and both the companies are looking for capex. Sir, looks like- The Indian gelatin industry is going through a structural transformation. What was once a slow growing commodity business is now being pulled up by three powerful demand forces: GLP-1 weight loss drugs, the gummy supplement boom, and the global collagen wellness trend. I would appreciate if you could sha…
